caption: The video captures a formal assembly, likely a legislative or parliamentary session, with numerous individuals seated in tiered rows of wooden desks. The attendees are dressed in a variety of attire, ranging from traditional Indian clothing to more Western-style suits and shirts. Many participants appear engaged, with some taking notes, while others are using mobile devices, possibly recording the proceedings or checking information. The atmosphere seems serious and focused, indicative of an important discussion or debate taking place. The setting is well-lit, suggesting an indoor venue designed for such official gatherings.
